issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across the pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Automated SMS messages not sending for pre-referral leads
issues.desc: Automated SMS messages were not being delivered to new leads across multiple lender types including MRC and Newrez leads. The last confirmed SMS sends were around January 30, 2026. Madelaine identified this as a likely product/integration issue and filed a ticket with the product team.
issues.workaround: Manually send SMS or follow-up messages to any leads that entered the workflow between approximately January 30 and February 11, 2026 who may not have received automated SMS outreach.

issues.title: LO change not reflected in automated agent emails — old LO still showing
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information rather than the updated one. The affected deal showed the old LO Paul instead of the new LO Julie Yocum. The fix was handled by Luis as a product-side resolution.
issues.workaround: For any deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify that the correct LO is reflected in previously sent automated emails and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: Deals marked as Closed Lost or Transferred were continuing to generate post-referral workflow check-in tasks instead of stopping enrollment. This affected at least one deal marked Closed Lost on 2/26 that still received a check-in task on 3/2. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on March 9 to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any post-referral check-in tasks that appeared on deals already marked as Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed after a contract fell through, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted stage change. The root cause was that deal stage Offer Accepted was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were moved to Offer Accepted a second time between approximately March 16 and the fix date, as those TCs would not have received their tasks automatically.

issues.title: MRC and publisher deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals (and potentially other deals without a lender attached) that were updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering TC workflow enrollment or task creation. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support and confirmed the issue was resolved around April 1, 2026, though the exact root cause was not publicly disclosed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC or publisher deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14 and April 1, 2026 into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are assigned.
